system.description:
Secret Dirty Work

Secrets must be protected. If they come out, people can get hurt, ruined, killed, and so on. You are hired to adjust the circle of people who can prove something. Will it be bigger? Or smaller?

Do you know what information you're after, or is that secret from you? If you have a chance, will you peek at it? Are you targeting a blackmailer to remove their hold, or getting evidence to give a blackmailer? Is the evidence to be destroyed? Do you plan to do as you are told?
